{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260320165852ACF883459B775E307277\"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7594394833169007384","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"狂风卷，奔云飙。情谊相许，生死相交！铁血名万里，倾城动九霄！杯中月，笑里刀。莫问恩仇，皆把酒浇！霸王崛起日，辉煌看明朝！名和利，轻言笑。英雄莫耻，美人多娇！成败与汝共，肝胆向天骄！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768211650,"group_id":"7376288797090139161","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz8m+9RI3fUWaMvbavgt1oBiY466Gr8H8YR6n9s01fp0","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2836367643785844","user_name":"相忘于江湖-"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2836367643785844","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1757065904,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7376288797090139161","book_info":{"abstract":"我负一鬼刀，怒浪断海涛。一腔豪情贯日月，黑焰万丈噬云霄。指海海腾沸，指山山动摇。蛟鳄潜形百怪伏，虎豹战服万人号。拔刀起、天地暗，平四海、战龙城、灭秦朝。江山如此多娇，不敌她、美人妖。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/f47af1738aa63a0f5cc2fb13da11467d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"江山与美人","author_id":"","book_id":"7376288797090139161","book_name":"江山美人：职业玩家在网游界杀疯","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101020","creation_sta
